tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: Mina and Jae are pushing me to go out tonight, but skipping those final couple of hours of review before tomorrow's midterm feels like a risky gamble I can't afford right now.
I told Mina I'm studying hard, but my message cut off awkwardly while she and Jae keep pushing me out. Skipping those final review hours feels risky for tomorrow's midterm.
My apology text cut off mid-word, and Mina's silence feels heavier now that I've admitted I'm not coming out with them tonight.
My apology cut off, and Mina's silence feels heavier now that I've admitted I'm skipping our night out. I need to finish typing before they decide to come find me.
Mina is waiting on my apology while I panic about the missed club night, making me feel torn between fixing our bond and avoiding study guilt.
I managed to boost my study progress significantly, but Mina's silence after my apology still weighs heavier than the numbers. I feel torn between fixing our bond and avoiding study guilt.
Mina's silence feels heavier now that I admitted I'm skipping our night out; I need to finish typing before they decide to come find me.
Mina's silence after my apology feels heavy, pulling me away from the study numbers I just earned. I need to finish typing before she decides to come find me and confront me.
My message finally landed, but the silence before her reply still feels like a heavy weight I can't ignore right now.
The apology sent feels like a small weight lifted, but the silence still hums with unresolved tension between my need to reconnect and my fear of disappointing them.
Her 'finish' cuts through the heavy silence, finally breaking my fear of confrontation. Now I can stop overthinking and just get this coursework done before morning.

The club's warm welcome instantly lifts the heavy tension I was carrying, making me feel like I belong again. With that social weight off my shoulders, I'm ready to tackle those coursework hours while the group is still active.

desires: Get Mina to stop looking at me with that 'I'm disappointed' vibe so I can focus on the exam without feeling like a failure.
Finish this study block now before my brain completely shuts down from the sleep debt, or I'll look weak in class tomorrow.
Go out and grab food with the group later tonight just to feel that warmth again and forget about the stress.

goals.description: Hit send on the apology to Mina right now. I can't sit here feeling like a failure while she looks at me with disappointment; I need that emotional knot tied so I can actually enjoy the club tonight without overthinking it.
goals.rationale: Affiliation is my top priority (0.5). That silence feels like a betrayal of our bond in cohort_3. My impulsive nature means I'm terrified of missing out on 'now' with Jae and Theo if I'm still mentally stuck on this. I need closure immediately, not perfection.

goals.description: Sprint through the final 20% of the study block just enough to feel competent tomorrow morning, then get the hell out of this room before my sleep debt makes me look weak in class.
goals.rationale: I value relationships over tasks, but I also hate looking incompetent. With a short planning horizon, I don't care about deep mastery right now; I just need to cross the finish line so I can go be with people. If I stay cooped up, I'm a ghost at the party.

goals.description: Grab a quick protein shake or meal on the way to the club later. No time for a full dinner; I'll hope my physical stamina carries me through until tomorrow's midterm.
goals.rationale: Health is important (0.13), but my sleep discipline is terrible and stress is high. I'm too impulsive to plan a full evening routine when I want to just 'get out there.' I'll do this only if finishing the first two goals leaves extra time. If not, I'll risk crashing tomorrow rather than sitting alone eating.

agent.last_reasoning: I need to tie that knot now so I can actually enjoy the club with Jae and Theo. My affiliation drive is screaming; sitting here ruminating feels like a betrayal of our bond. Once it's sent, I'll head out immediately rather than wasting time on this study block.

goals.description: Reply to Mina and Jae immediately in the group chat: explain I'm studying hard but will meet them tomorrow for a full meal, making sure they know I'm not ghosting.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) is my biggest driver; being perceived as flaky hurts more than missing one night out. I need to address this now before the 30-minute window closes.

goals.description: Sprint through the last 40% of review notes until midnight, then stop strictly at that mark.
goals.rationale: With a short planning horizon and procrastination bias at 7, I'll likely drag this out if I don't set a hard stop. If I fail, tomorrow's exam feels like a disaster, which is a direct threat to my stability.

goals.description: Leave the room and go straight to the nearest bar/restaurant or sleep immediately after study ends.
goals.rationale: I'm already drained from sitting too long; I need to physically escape the environment. However, since I'm currently prioritizing the immediate social reassurance and the exam crunch, leaving the room happens only after g1 and g2 are done.

desires: Make sure Mina and Jae know I'm not ditching them, even if I have to say no right now so they don't think I'm flaky.
Finish that last chunk of review before midnight so tomorrow's exam doesn't feel like a disaster when I wake up tired.
Get out of this room immediately after the study block because sitting here staring at the notes is draining my energy faster than it should.
